_comment: Teng Family City (藤家城) — Teng Clan seat (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L36). Teng Clan's 'Nine Great Nascent Souls' selection system. Estimated 50,000-150,000 residents (CANON_RI_ECOLOGY.md 1.5). Post-Wang-Lin-extermination: largely emptied ruin (Timeline E14). Stand-in: plains village. Final: clan fortress with 9 Nascent Soul trial towers, Teng Huayuan's soul-refining chamber.
